item.name: Tales of Adventure: One White Mage's Journey II
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's continuing path to becoming a realm-renowned white mage─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level white mage to 70 and complete all job quests up through “What She Always Wanted.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
